text: حَجَرٍ آخَرَ مَكْتُوبٌ هَذَا بَيْتُ اَللَّهِ اَلْحَرَامُ بِمَكَّةَ تَكَفَّلَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بِرِزْقِ أَهْلِهِ مِنْ ثَلاَثَةِ سُبُلٍ مُبَارَكٌ لِأَهْلِهِ فِي اَللَّحْمِ وَ اَلْمَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2312 - It has been narrated:
"It was found inscribed on another stone: 'This is the Sacred House of Allah (swt) in Mecca. Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, has guaranteed the sustenance of its people through three blessed means. It is blessed for its people in meat and water.'"
